author: Kleine Hexe5359732
title: It often forgets where you left off
content: I use it to listen to books and it often loses its mark. On the other hand, the equalizer is very useful, finely set playback speed and playback interruption timer

author: Fafner76
title: Due apps per avere tutto
content: In pratica mi dite che se voglio il supporto del gapless devo acquistare l’altra, certo non economica, vostra app. Che però non supporta tutto quello che supporta questa. Riunire tutte le caratteristiche in una sola non se ne parla, vero? Mi pare una vigliaccata, mi spiace!

author: erou
title: Pour le geek
content: Pas très facile à faire fonctionner…  cʼest assez le chaos pour trouver un lien stable avec son NAS ou lʼapplication pCloud. Les fichiers AIFF sont transformés en wav !!! Allez savoir pourquoi et disparaissent ou ne sont pas lus. Donc beaucoup de promesses mais rien qui tient la route.

author: visualdj
title: Top
content: Guter Sound, gute Bedienbarkeit und immer wieder Optimierungen 🥂

author: V MAX GAMER
title: It‘s FREE
content: Finnaly a good app that doesn’t bombard you wirh ads it’s the best one I tested so far and I think the eq is the best feature I guess I only use this app now! Thanks to the developer team!

author: Snoufaki
title: The best player
content:
I got this app cause I couldn’t find something better  for my iPhone … it’s easy to use and intuitive- the best part, I can put any song format and it plays … the app has all extras that someone could need. I am happy also for each development 
I pay only once and this is great! 
It worth and I works

author: ScorpionFixik
title: Супер!!!!!
content: Ура ура ура! Поправили пару моментов, теперь он идеален! С радостью купил!

author: Semir F.
title: Best iOS Music Player
content: This is the best music player on iOS. You can transfer and listen to it easily. The UI is clean. I use it to listen to my produced .wav sound.

author: Oliver.Burtscher
title: Very good - but…
content:
Very nice tool, compliment!

What’s not that good: Explaining offline (in my case with OneDrive). I first made my all of my music (140 GB) available offline directly in the OneDrive app, plus I had a connection from the Flacbox app to OneDrive. Result: About 280GB of data, but the offline music was not available in Flacbox. Solution was to mark the music folder available for offline use IN the Flacbox up, connecting to OneDrive. Now, I only have it offline, which I wanted.

A bit more detailed manual would have helped.

And furthermore: There is no support at all. I sent two messages via contact form and never got an answer.

author: UltraCocolover
title: Un petit bug
content: La lecture d’un fichier dsd128 ne marche pas quand l’écran est éteint sur mon iPad. Dommage

author: nix wissen
title: Very good
content: Very good tool. Because of some minor usability drawbacks, not the full 5 points.

author: fishingcake
title: Very useful, if also the sync would work
content: App itself very useful for all kind of file formats, but the offline sync over smb often fails without error message. Are there any log files to check?

author: Pascale_CH
title: Le meilleur 👍
content: Pratique, simple et complet. Merci, good job 👌

author: Stephane0066
title: Insatisfaction
content: Après une période où cette application fonctionnait parfaitement, depuis plusieurs mois, elle ne parvient plus à se connecter à mon mac en DLNA ou en SMB, quand d’autres applications concurrentes se connectent en quelques secondes ! Pouvez-vous corriger cela ou dois-je acheter une autre application ?

author: thesavingspark
title: Functionality Suspended
content: Pro version and songs stopped appearing.

author: Jiemme
title: Instability
content: Last version on I-pad mini 5 instable. Totaly unusable. Hope  they can do something quickly. When it works, nice app.

author: zag77
title: Très pratique
content: Merci vraiment simple et efficace

author: HanjakobundBabett
title: I have never received an answer at all
content:
For weeks I have been trying to get an answer from the developer. pCloud is obviously only offered for data stored in America. WebDav is extremely slow.
So what is going on now? Will the change be implemented or do I have to request a refund from Apple?

author: Gurgge
title: New Version introduced problems
content:
The team behind FlacBox are doing a great job, and I am using this app a lot to listen to music collaborators send me, longer podcasts I am taking with me, etc. It’s ability to open and play music from emails and organize it into folders and playlists directly on the phone is one of the best on iOS.

Unfortunately the new version removed the “Continue Playback” function on imported mp3 files. Pressing play to resume listening long files (2-3 hours, 170mb) doesn’t work to resume playback. It never did. But there was a “Continue Playback” function in the context menu which did just that. Unfortunately it is now gone, and so this doesn’t work anymore.... and the ability to listen to long tracks is one of the most important functions for me. Hope they can fix that.

author: Silverstift
title: Yes
content: Super app, pay once and enjoy!

author: maymyouser
title: No good
content: Unable to do so many things

author: R3myZ3r0
content: Probably the best, .ape files can not work.

author: g.dschi
title: Best offline audio player
content:
If you  eed an offline audio player to load and play your audio collection without going through itunes/music, that’s the player you are looking for.

Acces your files through the usual sort by category/album/artist/... view, or simply by browsing your file and directory structure.

It even comes with a built-in webdav server for uploading files over the air via your desktop browser. Awesome!

author: indexcatalogue
title: Amazing functionality
content: Cannot live without it. It even plays DSD. File tag support.  Cover art download. Yes it can be buggy but I can forgive them.

author: wagloo
title: Catastrophe
content: Instable, quitte inopinément, inutilisable

author: Theo8000
title: One of the flac player with network capacity
content: The album view mode is great. Network connection to NAS works flawlessly. Some features to filter album/track view are still missing.

author: cubebit
title: Passwortschutz
content: 🙏Bitte noch Touchid und Password. Dann ist es perfekt. Würde sofort die Pro version kaufen.👌
